since_last: 73% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +4.21%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 73% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.21% · BTC -1.98% · Gold -2.21% · Nasdaq100 -0.99%. 73% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +4.21%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +4.21%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -0.17%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: INTC is the standout at +8.70%
cards.body: Leaders: INTC +8.70%, MRVL +6.20%, LRCX +5.54%, TER +5.49%, LSCC +5.35%. Laggards: IBM -3.75%, SPCX -2.66%, EQIX -1.25%, WDAY -1.22%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.66% at $186.72
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.66% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
